title: Fig. 1 in Genetic Differences Among The E. Argentella And E. Bifasciella Species Groups (Lepidoptera: Elachistidae: Elachistinae)
author: Paulavičiūtė, Brigita
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Reproducibility of RAPD fingerprinting. DNA fingerprinting for different samples of Elachista species were obtained by PCR with primer OPA-09. M lines – 100bp marker; 1-17 lines DNA fingerprints from different samples.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Reproducibility of RAPD fingerprinting. DNA fingerprinting for different samples of Elachista species were obtained by PCR with primer OPA-09. M lines – 100bp marker; 1-17 lines DNA fingerprints from different samples.
